arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres: Premier League giants push aside Osimhen to focus on Sweden hitman
arts.sum: There were previously reports that Chelsea wanted Gyokeres at the end of the summer transfer market as an alternative to Victor Osimhen, yet it was for the Nigeria international they put most of their efforts in, coming up short as they could not agree wages with the Napoli striker. Viktor Gyokeres is one of the hottest transfer properties in football at present, and new competition has been announced in the race to sign the Sporting CP hitman.
